title: Important Dates for Loyola College Admissions 2026-27

detail.title: Important Dates for Loyola College Admissions 2026-27
detail.short_info: Loyola College Application Form 2026-27 is open. UG Last Date: 16 May 2026. Apply online for UG & PG courses at the official portal. Check important dates, programmes offered and eligibility.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Loyola College Application Form 2026-27

items: Register with valid email and mobile number.
Fill the online application form carefully.
Submit and download the confirmation page.
